rows.label: xs33100100_MSG0010
rows.name: My bad, Princess.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33100100_MSG0020
rows.name: Normally, this might be my role to play, but[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33100100_MSG0030
rows.name: But the one who brought BLADE this far[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33100100_MSG0040
rows.name: was you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33100100_MSG0050
rows.name: Your voice[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33100100_MSG0060
rows.name: will surely reach everyone[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33100100_MSG0070
rows.name: I am not a life-form born on Earth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33100100_MSG0080
rows.name:
I lost my home planet and drifted to
Earth, a refugee in all but name.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33100100_MSG0090
rows.name: However,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33100100_MSG0100
rows.name:
your mother planet was deeply compassionate
and accepted me with an open heart.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33100100_MSG0110
rows.name:
That heart was also nurtured within
everyone who lived on Earth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33100100_MSG0120
rows.name: I[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33100100_MSG0130
rows.name: was saved by that love.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33100100_MSG0140
rows.name: We lost Earth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33100100_MSG0150
rows.name: And now, once again,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33100100_MSG0160
rows.name:
we are about to lose Mira,
which we made our new home.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33100100_MSG0170
rows.name: To be honest,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33100100_MSG0180
rows.name: I once lost hope[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33100100_MSG0190
rows.name:
wondering whether we were destined to
wander forever in search of a new haven.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33100100_MSG0200
rows.name: But now, I have not lost hope at all[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33100100_MSG0220
rows.name:
Because every time we set out
for a new land, the heart[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33100100_MSG0230
rows.name: what we call the soul, I feel, has evolved.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33100100_MSG0240
rows.name: Yes, the soul.[System:Ruby rt=B.B. ][/System:Ruby][ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33100100_MSG0250
rows.name:
Even within a B.B., it breathes
with certainty inside all of you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33100100_MSG0260
rows.name:
The will to power that
strives to exist itself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33100100_MSG0270
rows.name:
No matter how harsh the
environment you are thrown into,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33100100_MSG0280
rows.name:
you have developed your
power through that will,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33100100_MSG0290
rows.name: honed your minds,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33100100_MSG0300
rows.name: and evolved your souls.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33100100_MSG0310
rows.name: Then our journey in search of a new haven[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33100100_MSG0320
rows.name: was never mere flight.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33100100_MSG0330
rows.name: It was all a voyage toward evolution.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33100100_MSG0340
rows.name: We will escape from this Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33100100_MSG0350
rows.name: The battle to do so will not be easy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33100100_MSG0360
rows.name: But I will say it again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33100100_MSG0370
rows.name: Do not forget.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33100100_MSG0380
rows.name: This is not a battle to flee.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33100100_MSG0390
rows.name:
It is a battle to survive
and evolve our souls.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33100100_MSG0400
rows.name: Destiny is not what creates the future.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33100100_MSG0410
rows.name: It is our will,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33100100_MSG0420
rows.name: constantly striving to exist![ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33100100_MSG0430
rows.name: Uwoooooh![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33100100_MSG0449
rows.name: [ST:wide ][ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33100100_MSG0450
rows.name: I love every single one of you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33100100_MSG0460
rows.name: Now,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33100100_MSG0470
rows.name: shall we go?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33100100_MSG0480
rows.name: All forces, commence advance![ST:wait ]
